data.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Petco Health and Wellness After Strong Q3 Results
Novartis Touts Encouraging Data From Late-Stage Study For Fabhalta In Rare Type Of Blood Disorder
data.description: Novartis reports positive Phase 3B results for Fabhalta in PNH patients, highlighting improved hemoglobin levels and consistent safety profile after 24 weeks.

data.title: What 11 Analyst Ratings Have To Say About Crocs
Spotlight on Salesforce: Analyzing the Surge in Options Activity
Why Genesco Stock Is Trading Higher On Friday
data.description: Genesco Q3 earnings surpassed estimates with a 6% increase in comparable sales, and the company revised its FY25 adjusted EPS outlook to $0.80-$1.00.
